101001111111000100011110100000010110110010011010101 - ASI: 24

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 00 * 1
  101 = 10 * 1
  110 = 1 * 10
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0010 = 00 * 10
  0110 = 0 * 110
  00111 = 001 * 11
  10101 = 10 * 101
  11110 = 11 * 110
  011011 = 0110 * 11
  0000001 = 0000 * 001
  00100110 = 0010 * 0110
  00111101 = 00111 * 101
  10100111 = 101 * 00111
  001000111101 = 0010 * 00111101
  0000001011011 = 0000001 * 011011
  0010011010101 = 00100110 * 10101
  1010011111110 = 10100111 * 11110
  1010011111110001000111101 = 1010011111110 * 001000111101
  00000010110110010011010101 = 0000001011011 * 0010011010101
  101001111111000100011110100000010110110010011010101 = 1010011111110001000111101 * 00000010110110010011010101
